channel.title: Vulncheck KEV
channel.description: Newly added vulnerabilities to the VulnCheck KEV database

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2025-6851 - Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
item.description:
The Broken Link Notifier plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Server-Side Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 1.3.0 via the ajax_blinks() function which ultimately calls the check_url_status_code() function. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to make web requests to arbitrary locations originating from the web application and can be used to query and modify information from internal services.

Vendor: PluginRx
Product: Broken Link Notifier plugin for WordPress

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://patchstack.com/database/wordpress/plugin/broken-link-notifier/vulnerability/wordpress-broken-link-notifier-plugin-1-3-0-unauthenticated-server-side-request-forgery-vulnerability

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2025-47812 - wftpserver wing_ftp_server Improper Neutralization of Null Byte or NUL Character
item.description:
In Wing FTP Server before 7.4.4. the user and admin web interfaces mishandle '\0' bytes, ultimately allowing injection of arbitrary Lua code into user session files. This can be used to execute arbitrary system commands with the privileges of the FTP service (root or SYSTEM by default). This is thus a remote code execution vulnerability that guarantees a total server compromise. This is also exploitable via anonymous FTP accounts.

Vendor: wftpserver
Product: wing_ftp_server

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://www.huntress.com/blog/wing-ftp-server-remote-code-execution-cve-2025-47812-exploited-in-wild
VulnCheck XDB Entries:
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/8131cb80ed91 - https://github.com/0xgh057r3c0n/CVE-2025-47812
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/ef88dbe0a5bc - https://github.com/0xcan1337/CVE-2025-47812-poC
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/4193f154f69b - https://github.com/ill-deed/WingFTP-CVE-2025-47812-illdeed
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/23e4b000d2c3 - https://github.com/pevinkumar10/CVE-2025-47812
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/429e43d983e8 - https://github.com/4m3rr0r/CVE-2025-47812-poc

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2019-5418 - Rails Ruby on Rails Path Traversal Vulnerability
item.description:
Rails Ruby on Rails contains a path traversal vulnerability in Action View. Specially crafted accept headers in combination with calls to `render file:` can cause arbitrary files on the target server to be rendered, disclosing the file contents.

Date Added to CISA KEV: 2025-07-07T00:00:00Z
Vendor: Rails
Product: Ruby on Rails

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/feeds/known_exploited_vulnerabilities.json
VulnCheck XDB Entries:
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/b79d8b670127 - https://github.com/Bad3r/RailroadBandit
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/cefcc3ffbf85 - https://github.com/daehyeok0618/CVE-2019-5418
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/7ec4db8cca50 - https://github.com/mpgn/Rails-doubletap-RCE
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/f2ddbe7de150 - https://github.com/mpgn/CVE-2019-5418

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2014-3931 - Multi-Router Looking Glass (MRLG) Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
item.description:
Multi-Router Looking Glass (MRLG) contains a buffer overflow vulnerability that could allow remote attackers to cause an arbitrary memory write and memory corruption.

Date Added to CISA KEV: 2025-07-07T00:00:00Z
Vendor: Looking Glass
Product: Multi-Router Looking Glass (MRLG)

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/feeds/known_exploited_vulnerabilities.json

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2025-29891 - Apache camel Improper Neutralization of Internal Special Elements
item.description:
Bypass/Injection vulnerability in Apache Camel. This issue affects Apache Camel: from 4.10.0 before 4.10.2, from 4.8.0 before 4.8.5, from 3.10.0 before 3.22.4. Users are recommended to upgrade to version 4.10.2 for 4.10.x LTS, 4.8.5 for 4.8.x LTS and 3.22.4 for 3.x releases. This vulnerability is present in Camel's default incoming header filter, that allows an attacker to include Camel specific headers that for some Camel components can alter the behaviours such as the camel-bean component, or the camel-exec component. If you have Camel applications that are directly connected to the internet via HTTP, then an attacker could include parameters in the HTTP requests that are sent to the Camel application that get translated into headers.  The headers could be both provided as request parameters for an HTTP methods invocation or as part of the payload of the HTTP methods invocation. All the known Camel HTTP component such as camel-servlet, camel-jetty, camel-undertow, camel-platform-http, and camel-netty-http would be vulnerable out of the box. This CVE is related to the CVE-2025-27636: while they have the same root cause and are fixed with the same fix, CVE-2025-27636 was assumed to only be exploitable if an attacker could add malicious HTTP headers, while we have now determined that it is also exploitable via HTTP parameters. Like in CVE-2025-27636, exploitation is only possible if the Camel route uses particular vulnerable components.

Vendor: Apache
Product: camel

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/apache-cve-2025-24813-cve-2025-27636-cve-2025-29891/

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2025-34057 - Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor
item.description:
An information disclosure vulnerability exists in Ruijie NBR series routers (known to affect NBR2000G, NBR1300G, and NBR1000 models) via the /WEB_VMS/LEVEL15/ endpoint. By crafting a specific POST request with modified Cookie headers and specially formatted parameters, an unauthenticated attacker can retrieve administrative account credentials in plaintext. This flaw allows direct disclosure of sensitive user data due to improper authentication checks and insecure backend logic.

Vendor: Ruijie
Product: NBR2000G/NBR1300G/NBR1000

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://www.cve.org/CVERecord?id=CVE-2025-34057

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2024-53944 - Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')
item.description:
An issue was discovered on Tuoshi/Dionlink LT15D 4G Wi-Fi devices through M7628NNxlSPv2xUI_v1.0.1802.10.08_P4 and LT21B devices through M7628xUSAxUIv2_v1.0.1481.15.02_P0. A unauthenticated remote attacker with network access can exploit a command injection vulnerability. The /goform/formJsonAjaxReq endpoint fails to sanitize shell metacharacters sent via JSON parameters, thus allowing attackers to execute arbitrary OS commands with root privileges.

Vendor: Tuoshi/Dionlink
Product: LT15D 4G Wi-Fi Devices

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-02&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-53944
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-03&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-53944
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-05&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-53944
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-06&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-53944
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-07&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-53944

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2014-1677 - technicolor tc7200_firmware Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor
item.description:
Technicolor TC7200 with firmware STD6.01.12 could allow remote attackers to obtain sensitive information.

Vendor: technicolor
Product: tc7200_firmware

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-02&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2014-1677
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-03&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2014-1677
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-04&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2014-1677
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-05&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2014-1677
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-06&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2014-1677

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2025-34067 - Deserialization of Untrusted Data
item.description:
An unauthenticated remote command execution vulnerability exists in the applyCT component of the Hikvision Integrated Security Management Platform due to the use of a vulnerable version of the Fastjson library. The endpoint /bic/ssoService/v1/applyCT deserializes untrusted user input, allowing an attacker to trigger Fastjson's auto-type feature to load arbitrary Java classes. By referencing a malicious class via an LDAP URL, an attacker can achieve remote code execution on the underlying system.

Vendor: Hikvision
Product: Integrated Security Management Platform

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://www.cve.org/CVERecord?id=CVE-2025-34067

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2025-29063 - lb-link bl-ac2100_firmware Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command ('Command Injection')
item.description:
An issue in BL-AC2100 V1.0.4 and before allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via the enable parameter passed to /goform/set_hidessid_cfg is not handled properly.

Vendor: lb-link
Product: bl-ac2100_firmware

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-02&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2025-29063

  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2025-07-04&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2025-29063
